validationPassed.Evidence: File size 19632 bytes (above the issue's 8-10KB target; DDD covers more sections than PEAA, so somewhat larger is reasonable; alwaysApply: false means this is a path-pulled rule, not always-loaded). Covers Bounded Context, Ubiquitous Language, Subdomain Classification, Aggregates, Entities and Value Objects, Domain Events, Domain Services, Anti-Corruption Layer, Context Mapping per issue spec. Pattern Selection guides composition; Anti-Patterns captures Anemic Domain Model, God Aggregate, Single Database Single Model, Generic Subdomain Glamour, Leaky Boundary, Past-Tense Command, Pattern Stacking. Boundaries section ties rule to ai-agents seams (agent runtime, session lifecycle, memory, skills/hooks as ACLs, GitHub integration as supporting subdomain). Explicitly references enterprise-patterns.md to avoid duplicating Repository / Unit of Work / Service Layer.

tasksUpdated.Evidence: Issue #1752 will close via Fixes keyword in PR body.

retrospectiveInvoked.Evidence: Narrow, low-risk new-file documentation change. No retrospective needed; pattern matches merged PR #1762 exactly.

workLog.outcome: Reused schema. Set alwaysApply: false because DDD is situational (applied when modeling agents, sessions, orchestration boundaries, or cross-context translation), matching the convention of enterprise-patterns.md.
